mapper.insert: insert into security_audit_log (user_id, operation_type, description, resource_type, resource_id, request_method, request_uri, request_params, client_ip, request_id, result, error_message) values (#{userId}, #{operationType}, #{description}, #{resourceType}, #{resourceId}, #{requestMethod}, #{requestUri}, #{requestParams}, #{clientIp}, #{requestId}, #{result}, #{errorMessage})
